name: Set of 2 Windsor Dining Chair - Threshold™
description:
Dine in style with the Set of 2 Windsor Dining Chairs from Threshold™. These classic wooden chairs are great for everyday meals and casual entertaining. They have a comfortable pitch and sturdy wood construction with a high fan back and a shallow saddle seat to keep the whole family comfy — a smart and stylish addition to your home furniture collection.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
